title: Assigned resources by projects, including retroactive visibility
excerpt:

posts.author: RyanBY (Ryan BY)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
Happy to hear your thoughts

So I have a list of projects where the assignees keep changing on a weekly basis.

I want to have visibility on who was assign in a specific week,
and also would like to make sure I fully utilizing my resources in a way that all employees are assigned to a project,
and all projects are assigned to (at least one) employee.

WDYT?

posts.author: rosalind (Rosalind Guy)
posts.cookedHtml: have you look at the Apps there is team view. I have not used it but it looks like it could be useful.

posts.author: richardmclennan (richard mclennan)
posts.cookedHtml: I am not sure Team view would give you that. I have just started playing with it

posts.author: rosalind (Rosalind Guy)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d be interested to know your thoughts as it is on mu list to have a look at Team view.

posts.author: richardmclennan (richard mclennan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Rosalind, we are still protyping but it seems to fill the gap that workload has with tasks. I think we will be using it when we fully adopt Monday.com over the next few months
